subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-26
subcodes.first_line: The influence of the Word of God is all-penetrative. One must simply arise and engage in the service of the Cause... The armies of the Supreme Concourse are drawn in battle-array on the plain of the Kingdom... The Zoroastrians must be very enkindled
subcodes.subjects: @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
